name: Scissortail Park
description:
Court rules: 

Dear Pickleball Players,

Please limit use of the Pickleball
Courts to TWO games to 11 points
if other players are waiting.

Please use the paddle rack to keep
a place in line.

Sportsmanship and courtesy are
expected at all times.

Food trucks are sometimes also available.

Restrooms are located west of the courts at the Sports Pavilion.
